title: Reverse Array
description: The function below should reverse the `dataPoints` array in place, but a critical condition is missing from the loop constraint.
codeTemplate:
def reverse_array(dataPoints):
    left = 0
    right = len(dataPoints) - 1
    while ________:
        dataPoints[left], dataPoints[right] = dataPoints[right], dataPoints[left]
        left += 1
        right -= 1
    return dataPoints
hints: Consider when the indices cross each other.

title: Two Sum Optimization
description: This function finds if two elements sum to the target, but its O(N^2) complexity will timeout on large inputs. Identify the correct data structure and refactor to O(N) time.
